_comment: Phase 110 (V13-PLAN.md) UI-wiring CI guard allowlist. See scripts/check-ui-wiring.js and ARCHITECTURE.md for the wiring conventions this documents.

getElementById.page-panel: assigned via el.id = 'page-panel' in js/app.js:7857 (createElement pattern), never appears as a literal id= in a template
getElementById.bi-toast: assigned via el.id = 'bi-toast' in js/notifications.js:573 (createElement pattern)
getElementById.worker-profile-panel: assigned via el.id = 'worker-profile-panel' in js/app.js:5203 (createElement pattern)
getElementById.bir-gj-csv: id passed through window.birToolbarHTML({csvId}) (js/bir.js:123) which interpolates id="${csvId}" — dynamic id, the static regex can't see it
getElementById.bir-gl-csv: same window.birToolbarHTML indirection as bir-gj-csv, js/bir.js:306-308
getElementById.bir-crb-csv: same window.birToolbarHTML indirection as bir-gj-csv, js/bir.js:348-350
getElementById.bir-cdb-csv: same window.birToolbarHTML indirection as bir-gj-csv, js/bir.js:385-387
getElementById.bir-vat-csv: same window.birToolbarHTML indirection as bir-gj-csv, js/bir.js:446-454
getElementById.bir-wht-csv: same window.birToolbarHTML indirection as bir-gj-csv, js/bir.js:554-556
getElementById.bir-alpha-csv: same window.birToolbarHTML indirection as bir-gj-csv, js/bir.js:644-646
getElementById.e-vat: id passed through window.vatFieldHTML(id, def) (js/bir.js:40) which interpolates id="${id}" — dynamic id, same indirection class as the bir-*-csv entries
